listing.title: 4,517 SF Vacant Land
listing.address: 133 Halsted St, Lowell, Lake County, IN 46356

description: ABSOLUTE SALE For registration requirements and regulations, please review here or contact Hannah Ladenheim | 936-274-1332 | hladenheim@crexi.​com.​ 133 N Halstead St.​ at 133 N Halstead St, Lowell, IN 46356 presents a compelling opportunity to acquire vacant land in the heart of Lowell.​ Positioned within walking distance to downtown, this 4,517 SF site offers strong potential for investors, developers, and owner-users seeking a well-located infill development or redevelopment opportunity.​ Zoned TC (Town Center), the property is ideally suited for users looking to capitalize on a central location with convenient access to Lowell’s downtown amenities, local businesses, and community activity.​ Its setting in the town core makes it an attractive option for a variety of future uses, subject to local approvals.​ Whether you are planning a new development, pursuing a strategic land hold, or targeting a redevelopment play in an established area, this site stands out for its location and flexibility.​ Opportunities to secure vacant land in Lowell’s downtown-adjacent area are limited, making this parcel a rare chance to invest in the continued growth and revitalization of the community! ​ Non-Contingent ​ Earnest Money Deposit is Greater of $20,000 or 10% of the Purchase Price ​ Marketing Fee: 5% of the Winning Bid Amount, $20,000 minimum ​ $10,000 Participation Deposit 133 Halsted St, Lowell, IN 46356
investment_highlights: IN Auctioneer: Stephen Dawson, AU12500067 Crexi Technologies, AC32500016 ​Heart of Lowell Location ​Development Opportunity ​Walking Distance to Downtown ​Strong Redevelopment Opportunity
